summary: Backend-only comprehensive testing completed. All 30 tests passed (100% success rate). Tested health check, doctor info, diseases library (9 items), bookings (guest + authenticated), auth flow (session management, role elevation), IPSS calculator (auth-protected), prescriptions (doctor-only with 403 for patient role), blog (4 posts), videos (4+ items), education (5 guides), and calculators list. MongoDB _id exclusion verified across all endpoints. CORS working correctly. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ MongoDB _id exclusion working correctly across all endpoints
✅ Environment variables used correctly (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME, EMERGENT_AUTH_URL)
✅ Auth flow with Bearer token and Cookie support working
✅ Role-based access control (patient vs doctor) working correctly
✅ All 9 diseases, 4 blog posts, 4+ videos, 5 education guides present
Minor: test_create_prescription_doctor_role returns a value (pytest warning) - harmless but should return None
seed_data_creation: Created test users in MongoDB: patient.test@consulturo.app (role=patient) and doctor.test@consulturo.app (role=doctor) with valid session tokens for auth testing. Test data created during tests: 2 bookings (guest + authenticated), 1 IPSS record, 2 prescriptions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. All endpoints tested and working. Test users remain in database for future testing. Frontend testing not performed in this iteration. MongoDB collections: users (3), bookings (3), prescriptions (2), user_sessions (2), ipss_records (1).
